channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria to face Poland and Portugal without Osimhen and Lookman in international friendlies
item.description: Nigeria Super Eagles go enter their upcoming international friendly matches against Poland and Portugal without two of their biggest attacking stars, Victor Osimhen and Ademola Lookman. Head coach Eri...

item.title: JADE and Lily Allen perform new 'Beg For Me' remix live at Mighty Hoopla

item.title: Cardiologist raises concerns and questions about details in Trump’s latest medical exam
item.description: A prominent cardiologist, Dr. Jonathan Reiner, publicly raised several questions regarding President Donald Trump’s most recent medical examination, despite the White House physician’s conclusion that...

item.title: Doctors at Tiruchi CME highlight importance of early detection and prevention of kidney diseases

item.title: Ali Musa Gilani denies UAE deportation claims, calls reports fake
item.description: MNA Ali Musa Gilani, son of former prime minister and Senate Chairman Yousaf Raza Gilani, has strongly denied social media claims suggesting that he was deported from the United Arab Emirates (UAE). I...

item.title: Former President Kikwete attends funeral of University of Dar es Salaam staff member
item.description: Former Tanzanian President Jakaya Kikwete joined mourners at a funeral service for a long-serving staff member of the University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM), who had recently passed away. The ceremony bro...

item.title: Trump’s Foreign Policy Struggles Highlight Challenges in the Middle East
item.description: The article discusses former President Donald Trump's aggressive and confrontational approach to international relations, comparing it to schoolyard bullying. It highlights his domestic and foreign ac...

item.title: Kenyan Shilling Remains Stable Below KSh 130 as CBK Maintains Strong Forex Reserves
item.description: During the week ending May 28, 2026, the Kenyan shilling remained relatively stable against major global currencies, trading at KSh 129.52 per US dollar, slightly stronger than the KSh 129.57 recorded...

item.title: The Importance of Spending Time in Nature for Wellbeing and Mental Health
item.description: A recent survey indicates that nearly half of UK adults spend less than three hours per week in natural environments such as gardens, parks, fields or woodlands. Many readers shared deeply personal re...

item.title: DA urges impartial and thorough Section 89 inquiry into President Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala matter
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has called for a comprehensive and impartial investigation into the Section 89 impeachment inquiry involving President Cyril Ramaphosa over the Phala Phala matter. Speakin...

item.title: EU Foreign Policy Chief Kaja Kallas to Visit Islamabad for Eighth EU-Pakistan Strategic Dialogue

item.title: Clinical trial shows pancreatic cancer drug significantly extends survival compared to chemotherapy
item.description: A new clinical trial has revealed encouraging results for a long-anticipated pancreatic cancer treatment called daraxonrasib, a drug that has been in development for more than four decades. According ...

item.title: SADC to Strengthen Regional Development Agenda at 2026 AfDB Annual Meetings
item.description: The Southern African Development Community (SADC) is taking a more active role in shaping Africa’s development agenda as it prepares to co-host the 2026 African Development Bank (AfDB) Annual Meetings...

item.title: Trump’s Primary Battles Could Complicate Approval of Future Health Nominees

item.title: Construction near Karachi’s Hill Park stopped amid dispute over alleged NOC; MQM-P seeks investigation
